description.ko: 보이지 않는 소리의 주파수를 빛과 기하학의 만질 수 있는 풍경으로 바꾸는 공감각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: An exploration of synesthesia, turning invisible sound frequencies into a tangible landscape of light and geometry.

prompt: A cinematic high-tech visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Sonic Sphere.' A central floating sphere of liquid silver vibrates at a sub-bass frequency, generating complex 3D holographic ripples that manifest as #4169E1 royal blue waves and #FF4500 electric orange frequencies. The surrounding space is filled with #32CD32 green geometric particles and #FFD700 gold light trails. Set against a dark studio void, featuring hyper-realistic ray tracing and intricate UI elements reacting to sound. 8k resolution.
